meta.title: About Peter Weltman — CEO & Founder | Man of the World (MOW)
meta.description: Meet Peter Weltman, CEO & Founder of Man of the World (MOW) — more than a decade leading global brand strategy and messaging for companies scaling at the highest level, supporting $85M+ in client fundraises and Tier 1 media coverage.

intro: More than ten years leading global brand strategy and messaging for companies scaling at the highest level — work that has supported $85M+ in client fundraises, secured Tier 1 media coverage, and delivered award-winning SBIR/STTR grants in the U.S.
bio: Peter has partnered with NVIDIA, P&G, 3M, Carta, and SoCal Edison — leading full-scale brand creation across rebrands, M&A, go-to-market, brand identity, and web. He's a global GenAI keynote speaker across the U.S. and LATAM.
quote: We don't start with competitors — we start with first principles. Every brand already carries its DNA. Our work is to unearth the core truth, then express it with clarity, conviction, and cultural authority.
